name: reinhardt-agents-plugin
description: Codex and Claude Code plugin for reinhardt-web application development and deployment via reinhardt-cloud

interface.shortDescription: Reinhardt web development guidance for Codex and Claude Code
interface.longDescription: Use Reinhardt to guide reinhardt-web project scaffolding, modeling, REST API development, testing, dependency injection, authentication, authorization, admin setup, migrations, pages, macros, signals, configuration, and linting.
defaultPrompt: Add a model, API, admin, and tests to this Reinhardt app.
Upgrade this app to the latest reinhardt-web release.
